created_for: GS LinkOps AI resource database building
language_strategy: English-first source records and database fields.

records.name: NASA Near Earth Network public ground-station capability matrix
records.confidence_level: Medium. Useful public summary of NASA NEN station assets and bands; must be cross-checked against NASA SCaN/NEN official user guides before operational or commercial use.
records.next_action: Use this record to define a provider_federation table because NEN contains NASA-owned and partner-operated stations such as KSAT, SANSA and SSC resources.

records.name: SvalSat operational model, SLE usage and delivery latency reference
useful_for: S-band TT&C and X-band high-speed download pattern
records.confidence_level: Medium. Valuable public operational description, especially for architecture and risk-field design; exact current commercial access and RF-chain details require KSAT confirmation.
records.next_action: Add delivery_latency_public, protocol_reference and civilian_concession_flag fields to station fingerprints and use SvalSat as the polar commercial benchmark.

records.name: TrollSat S/X-band antenna, polar twice-per-orbit service and backhaul reference
records.confidence_level: Medium. Strong for polar coverage logic and operational architecture; station-by-station RF/baseband, availability and commercial rules need operator confirmation.
records.next_action: Use TrollSat as the paired-polar-station model for matching logic: northern + southern high-latitude resources can reduce maximum contact gaps.

records.name: Santa Maria Island Station multi-operator site and hosted antenna reference
useful_for: ESA / Galileo / Leaf Space / PT Space / EUMETSAT / LeoLabs co-location reference
records.confidence_level: Medium. Good public co-location and hosted-antenna pattern; exact current contracts, interfaces and service access must be verified with each operator.
records.next_action: Add co_located_operators and hosted_antenna_flag to the station_site schema, because one physical site can host multiple independent commercial/institutional systems.

records.name: SatNOGS Network / Database API model for station, observation and transmitter metadata
records.confidence_level: Medium-high for open metadata and schema inspiration; not a commercial payload-downlink or professional SLA source.
records.next_action: Use SatNOGS as a schema reference for observation records and satellite transmitter metadata, while keeping it separate from commercial ground-station availability.

records.name: NanoSat MO Framework based on CCSDS Mission Operations services
useful_for: software management and mission planning service fields
records.confidence_level: Medium-high for interface vocabulary and system architecture; not an operator capability sheet and not proof of support by a specific ground station.
records.next_action: Add CCSDS MO / NanoSat MO vocabulary to the standards table and use ground_adapter / ground_proxy as generic interface-pattern fields.

records.name: NASA Tracking and Data Relay Satellite System public relay network reference
useful_for: S-band / Ku-band / Ka-band relay data-rate benchmark
records.confidence_level: Medium. Useful for taxonomy and relay-mode concepts; not a commercial GSaaS capability source.
records.next_action: Create a communications_path_type field with values such as direct_to_ground, ground_network, inter_satellite_link and relay_satellite.

records.name: Optimal and scalable ground-station selection research for LEO missions and large constellations
useful_for: cost / downlink volume / communication gap tradeoff
integer programming and surrogate optimization concepts
records.confidence_level: Medium-high for algorithmic design and matching-field extraction; not a source of current provider pricing or live availability.
records.next_action: Implement matching score fields around cost, downlink volume, max communication gap and provider diversity; keep provider price and live availability as external inputs.

recommended_next_batch_targets: ATLAS Space Operations official Freedom/API material
Azure Orbital official Contact Profile documentation
Viasat Real-Time Earth official ground-station service material
SSC CONNECT official service pages and capability sheets
official KSAT SvalSat/TrollSat pages or brochures
